statement: In every magma, Equation 2630 (`x = (y * ((z * w) * z)) * z`) implies Equation 423 (`x = x * (x * (y * (z * y)))`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0118
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op y (op (op z w) z)) z)) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op x (op x (op y (op z y))))
